assertions.description: CSS.supports() accepts the bare scroll named timeline range.
CSS.supports() accepts scroll range start and end offsets.
CSS.supports() accepts partial offsets inside the scroll named range.
animation-range-start can attach the 0% keyframe to the scroll named range start.
animation-range-end can attach the 100% keyframe to the scroll named range end.
A view() timeline animation retains scroll as its computed attachment range.
assertions.test: (() => { const el = document.createElement('div'); el.style.cssText = 'animation: probe linear both; animation-timeline: view(block); animation-range: scroll 0% scroll 100%;'; document.body.append(el); const cs = getComputedStyle(el); const ok = cs.animationTimeline.includes('view') && cs.animationRangeStart.includes('scroll') && cs.animationRangeEnd.includes('scroll'); el.remove(); return ok; })()

assertions.description: A named view timeline can be targeted with animation-range: scroll 0% scroll 100%.
assertions.test: (() => { const host = document.createElement('div'); const subject = document.createElement('div'); const bar = document.createElement('div'); host.style.cssText = 'timeline-scope: --probe; height: 80px; overflow: auto;'; subject.style.cssText = 'view-timeline-name: --probe; view-timeline-axis: block; height: 180px;'; bar.style.cssText = 'animation: probe linear both; animation-timeline: --probe; animation-range: scroll 0% scroll 100%;'; host.append(subject, bar); document.body.append(host); const subjectStyle = getComputedStyle(subject); const barStyle = getComputedStyle(bar); const ok = subjectStyle.viewTimelineName.includes('--probe') && barStyle.animationTimeline.includes('--probe') && barStyle.animationRangeStart.includes('scroll') && barStyle.animationRangeEnd.includes('scroll'); host.remove(); return ok; })()

assertions.description: Keyframe selectors can be attached to scroll 0% and scroll 100% points.
assertions.test: (() => { const sheet = new CSSStyleSheet(); sheet.replaceSync('@keyframes probe { scroll 0% { opacity: 0; } scroll 100% { opacity: 1; } }'); const rule = sheet.cssRules[0]; return rule && rule.cssRules && Array.from(rule.cssRules).some((item) => item.keyText === 'scroll 0%') && Array.from(rule.cssRules).some((item) => item.keyText === 'scroll 100%'); })()
